title: Salt for fabric
body:
This mod port [https://modrinth.com/mod/salt](https://modrinth.com/mod/salt) to fabric 1.20.1

Note that we currently does not support food from other mods for salting. It will be added in the next version.

### Salt adds a food salting mechanic, as well as several other features and blocks.

![Salting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dd848ac2a069b63e836b0b015b18419336af3da8.png)

![Rock Salt](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5840d5366fc87a3389821810a1d9eb860debdb37.png)

![Other features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9612fe1e813adfc1df9c75cbb9629eeff76b802a.png)


<details>
<summary>Description in text form</summary>

### Description
- Food can now be salted to improve the taste and add nutrition.
- Salting recipe is dynamic and controlled by "salt:can_be_salted" tag:
- Several mods, such as Farmer's Delight, are supported out of the box.
- Nutrition value can be configured per food.
### Rock Salt
- Rock Salt will generate underground (sililar to ores) in dripstone caves, ocean and beach biomes.
- When harvested, Rock Salt Ore will drop Raw Rock Salt, which is crafted into Salt.
- Salt can be also obtained by growing Salt Crystals or by evaporating water in a cauldron.
### Other features
- All Salt blocks are dissolvable in water.
- Salt blocks will melt adjacent ice and snow blocks.
- Ice and snow can also be melted by sprinkling them with salt.
- The mod is highly configurable:
  - Tags are used for everything.
  - All features can be turned off in a config.

</details>
